titleStmt.title: SII 27.416: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 416. (A.R. No. 565 of 1929-30.) HATYAṄGAḌI, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) set up in the prākāra of Lōkanāthēśvara temple.
It is dated Śaka 1462, Viśvāvasu. The cyclic year corresponds with Śaka 1467 (1545-46 A.D.)

The record specifies the amount of paddy to be supplied to the Lōkanāthadēva temple from the lands, whose boundaries etc. are given, situated at Gulavāḍi. It also registers two other gifts of land made to the same temple respectively by Nandiyāḷuva and Nāraṇa, grandsons of Dāruseṭṭi-gaḷutti and by Mallayya-mugila, son of Nāraṇa-hegaḍe. The first of those two gifts was made in the year Īśvara, Bhādrapada śu. 1, Tuesday.
The second gift was made in the summer month of the cyclic year Piṅgaḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēnamaḥ śrī sarasvatyāyēṁnamaḥ śrīgurubyōṁnamaḥ nirvighnamastu namastuṁga śiraḥcuṁbi ca
ṁdra cāmaracāravē trayilōkyaṁ nagarāṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē svastiśrī vijayādbhudaya śālivāhana śakava
ruśa 1492 neya Upakramitavāda viśvavasu saṁvatsaṁdau haṭṭi ya 0 gaḍidu loka
nātha dēvara bhaṁḍārakka kuḷavāḍiyiṁda bhattasaluva gaddevivara nāruseṭṭibage biṭṭa koḷakke gadde
muḍi 2 kke bayala lekkadalu muḍi 1 yeraḷa nauḍivoḷage mu ... Adarriṁda paḍuvalu beṭṭalaṁba gade
ma 2 . nīru Oḷima 1 kāsagadehāne 60 kke bayala lekkadalu . mu kerregadeya paḍuvalu ma 1 ke . maṁdi
saṁkarana gaddeyiṁda mūḍalu mu 1 ke ma 11 kaṁbaḷa bāḷu mu 1 bābaḷiyanahāḷi ma 1 goḷabegadde ma 4 kke mu 2 deUtimallagadde
keḷagaṇa makkamu 1 kke mu . baṁkaneṁba gadde mu 2 . kavvalahāḷibayalu mu . Aṁtugadde mu 14 . hōnnappaseṭṭi hirigadde mu 4 hā
ya bālekaṁbaḷitibagekere . bāgilagaddemu 1 kke mu . yeranaḍi gade mu 1 . ge mu ... Ādarravorttinahāḷi mu . gemu . sūrihāḷi
mu ... gemu . 5 Adarriṁda mēlaṇadu mu 1 . ge mu ... bayalu kaṁbaḷa bāḷu mu 1 . be peyaḍi hāḷimu 1 . Aḍakeya
hāḷi mu 1 baccalabaḷiya gademu . mattaṁ baccalabaḷi gadde mu 6 ... 5 mābaḷa saṁkaraseṭṭi bage tāraṇa mekke
timmayyanāyakara bage tāraṇamakke mu 1 kke mu . Adarriṁda baḍagalu yeraneṁbagadde mu 1 . gemu . 5 Adarriṁda baḍage
U mu 1 . ge mu . heḍalahāḷi mu 1 . Adarriṁda mēlaṇadu mu 1 Adarriṁda baḍagalu mu 1 Ādarriṁda mēlaṇadu mu ...
guḷiyanagadde mu 1 . kaḷarahāḷimu . hāyiganahāḷimu 1 . hosamāṭada gaddemu 1 . Aramanebage saṁkadabāgila nālvattuhāne
yeṁbagadde mu 1 hovinagadde mu 1 . ge mu . 5 Aṁttu mu 12 tiṁmmayya bhaṁḍāribage seṭaneṁbagademu 2 . du bayulu Uḍe
ke 6 mu 2 Adarriṁda mēlaṇadu mu 1 . Adarriṁda mēlaṇadumu ... nelliya gadde Uḍe 2 kke ma 1 . suragiyada mekke 1 . gemu
ḍe . 5 Aṁttū gadde mu 5 hārukruṣṇanabage maneyiṁdaṇa huṇusegedde mu 1 . be
ṭṭa hāḷi mu . muḷiyana gadde mu . Aṁttū gadde mu 4 muṁḍi beṁmmāḷuvana hābaḷi hiri gadde bayalu mu 3 . kaḷani gadde mu 1 . 5
Ubhayaṁ mu 4 . 5 haḍagina basavanabaḷi dēvaṇahalageyeṁba hirigadde mu 3 . Adarriṁda mūḍalu mu ... Adarriṁda ba
ḍagalu mu 1 . Adarriṁda teṁkalumu Ābage Adara vottina gadde mu . Aṁttu gadde mu 5 ... muḷanatiṁmmayyanabage seḍe la
gadde mu 1 . mattaṁ neḍelagadde mu 1 . Aḷahāḷi mu 1 . cakkeyārana gadeyiṁda teṁkalu hāyimaṁṇagade mu 1 teṁginagadde
mu 3 haḍuvalu yiṁmaṇṇu hagaraneṁba gadde 70 hānege �ne 33 hūvina gadde 50 hānege 25 hānegōḷigadde yeraḍakka mu 1 sūriya
hāḷi mūrrakke 50 hāne ga 25 hāne suragiya mekke 50 hānege 25 hānekaḷarahāḷimu 2 dēvasvadahāḷi mu . caksāranagade mu 2
cinabeṭṭaneṁba gaddehā mu 2 . saṇamorabu 1 . doḍḍamorabu mu 3 saṭṭanaṁba gadde mu 2 . seṭṭanahāḷi mu hāṟu maṇṇagadde mu 1
... halasumaṇṇagadde mu 1 ... teṁku mu 2Þ ... bōca rā ḍiti bage paḍuvalu 70 hānege bayalu 35 hene Uddare saṁkarana bagemu 1
... nāraṇāḷuvarabage hosabeṭṭanalli hūvinagade 50 hānege 25 hānemāvinagade 50 hānege 25 hāne AgeAḍi mūḍi ... makke gadde muḍi 4
kke mu 2 bāviya merkkeṁ hāne ga 30 hāne Aḍalagadde muḍi 2 huṇase Aḍiyahāḷi 20 hānege 10 haḷiya koḍage muḍe 2 ra be
ṭṭinallāda Ubeṭṭaneluṁba gaddemu 1 . baḍubayalu nālvattahāne Eṁbagaddeyaṁ biṭṭina hāḷi mu 1 Aḍake hittilahāḷi mu 1 . ge
mu . kuḷiyana gade mu 1 . ge mu . 5 Aṁttu gade mu . 3 ... mattaṁ honnappaseṭṭibage kaṭanagadde mu 2 maṭhadabāḷu cakkeyārana ga
ddemu 1 haraḷana keḷagaṇa gade hāḷihāse 5 tārrinagadde mu 0 ... Adarra mūḍalu hāne 15 Adarra paḍuvalu hāne 20 mattaṁ
Adarriṁda mūḍalu hāne 10 kerdateṁkalu mu ... 5 haraḷina hāḷimu . Arkiyakalla vottinagade muḍi 2 ke mu 1 Aṁttu
gadde mu
completely damaged
Ubhayaṁ mu 15 Aṁṇama nalage
1 . vōṭi gade vō 1 yeraḍakke mu 1 ... 1 . kuṁbārahāḷi mu
teṁka tōra hāḷimu 1 . baṁkaneṁba gadde mu 1 . Aṁttugade
mu 1 . kācana hāḷi mu . kuṁbāra hāḷi mu 1 . Adara pottila
sāgarahāḷi mu 1 baṁkane bagadde mu 1 . Adara pottilahāḷi mu 5 Aṁttugade muḍi 5 teṁka
maneya nāraṇaheggaḍeya bage nāgaranā na gadde mu 1 . Adara keḷagaṇadu . ya kallagadde mu 1 . paḍuva mu
ḍi 1 Ubhayaṁ mu 4 guḷavāḍiya voḷage lōka nāthadēvara dhēvasada bāḷamuḍi ge 70 hāne bhadalkedalu
pūrvvavodalāgi kaṭṭada dēvasvaveṁbadā koḍalavoḷage baha dēvasvada mekkeya koḍalu māniyacatusīmeya viva
ra mūḍalu yettida Agaḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalugōpuheggaḍiti yettida Āgaḷiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu braṁmma
svada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu harida bacaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtīnālku catusīmeyavoḷagaṇa koḍalu
māniya sarvvasvada mēli lōkanātadēvarige naḍava dēvasvada bha muḍi 10 yīśvara saṁvatsarada śudha 1-madha
vāradallu haṭṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvarige dāru seṭṭigayittiya moṁmakkaḷu naṁdiyāḷuvanu nāraṇa
nu yi kartaru tāu voppitāu braṁhmadāyada ṭhāvina catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu yellusavaḍanebara
da Aruvārada tōṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu haṁdavoḷeyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu tiṁma
ppa seṭṭiya tōṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu yettida Agaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī nālnu catussīmeyiṁ
da voḷa ga ṇa sthaḷavanu lōkanāthadēvarige sahiraṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyaneradu koṭeU
pigala saṁvatsarada bēsage tiṁgaḷu modalāgi śrīmatu haṭiyaṁgaḍiya lōkanāthadēvarige tōṭamaneya
saṁkarahegaḍemane nāraṇahegaḍe Aruvāra patrada vakhaṇiya kramaveṁteṁdare gaḷāḍiyoḷage
A bāḷacatusīmeya vivara . mūḍalu kartana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu harida baccaliṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu hakaḷana gaddeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu . baḍagalu hariva baccaliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī nā
lku gaḍiyiṁ voḷage bayalu mūḍi 2 mattaṁ mūḍalu ḍeya hāḷiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu . teṁkalu hari
da baccaliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu ragana gadeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu haraḷana gadeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu haraḷana gadeyiṁdaṁ teṁka
lu . yiṁtī naṁma gadeya bāḷavoḷageṇa bayalu . cekkiyārana gade muḍi 1 nakatyana hāḷiya mūḍalu
hoyigeya hāḷiyiṁda paḍuvalu . teṁkalu nāraṇakēriya yiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Ageyakalla
hāḷiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu . baḍagalu nāruseṭṭiya mavāneyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu . yiṁttī nāluku catusī
yiṁdoḷagaṇa bayalu hāḷi haneraḍu hāne . mattara bāluhāḷi nālkuhāne tadiya gadeya voḷa
ge Aṁttu mūrumuḍiya hadināru hāne gadeyanu biḍāruvāravāgi yirisi . lōkanāthadēvara ka
yya nāraṇaheggaḍe tegadu koṁḍadu bārakūra parivartamānake saluva doḍavaraha gadyāna 17 . Akṣara
dallu hadinēḷuvare varaha . yomartavanu basarūra nāraṇamugilara maga mallayya mugilaru koṭu yi bā
ḷiṁdaṁ baṁdha bhuktiyanu lōkanātha dēvarige naṁdādīvigeya yeṁṇegeṁdu biṭadu . yi bāḷiguṁ
ṭāda dēvasva kuḍukūra koṭenātadēvarige muḍi 1 ke mukālu māḍiyakiyalkedalu naḍasuva A
ki nāgaṁḍugadalu muḍi 2 hāne 179 nakatyanahāḷige lōkanātha dēvarige naḍasuva batta 17 hāne
�yopatrake AdaArikeya ho ṇe ṁḍara viṣṇuhāḍiya maga kruṣṇahāḍi . sākṣidoregaḷu
�yoḷiya ḍiya yisaradāsa . guḷavāḍiya Aṁma toḷusa kartana voppa . hoṇedana voppa .
sākṣi dōregaḷa voppa . yiṁtivara Ubhayaṁ matadiṁda baḷiṁjiya nāraṇaheggaḍeya ba
raha
Digital edition of SII 27.416 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
